title: Racing Limits
description: An high-octane highway racing game. Maneuver through traffic at extreme speeds, overtake cars closely for extra points, and master multiple game modes!
instructions: Use WASD or Arrow keys to steer, accelerate, and brake. Overtake other vehicles closely at high speeds to earn bonus points and extra cash.

title: City Bus Driver
description: A premium simulation bus driving game where you can experience being a real bus driver. Choose your favorite bus, navigate busy city routes, and complete challenging missions!
instructions: Follow traffic pathways, navigate checkpoints carefully, and complete all 60 custom simulation driving routes successfully.

title: Drift Boss
description: An arcade drifting game where timing and drift precision is everything. Steer through tricky corners, timing your drifts perfectly to stay on the narrow platforms!
instructions: Press and hold Spacebar or Mouse Click to drift right. Release to steer back left. Keep your balance on the platforms and collect coins!

title: Subway Surfers
description: The ultimate endless runner classic. Dash, dodge oncoming hazard trains, and escape the grumpy inspector and his dog with incredible hoverboard stunts!
instructions: Use Left/Right arrow keys to change lanes. Up Arrow to jump/vault over hurdles. Down Arrow to slide. Double tap to activate hoverboards!

title: Smash Karts
description: An intense 3D multiplayer kart battle arena game. Drive fast, collect power-ups, and blow up rival karts to claim victory!
instructions: Use WASD or Arrow keys to steer your kart. Press Spacebar to fire weapons and deploy wacky explosive power-ups collected from boxes.

title: Gulper.io
description: A competitive multiplayer snake game where you control a glowing worm, battle other players in a neon arena, and collect glowing orbs to grow massive!
instructions: Use your mouse pointer to guide your worm. Hold Left Mouse Click or Spacebar to boost speed at the cost of your length. Cut off other players to eliminate them and absorb their energy!

title: Rodha
description: A fast-paced minimalist action platformer. Navigate a agile bouncing blob, dodge deadly moving buzzsaws, hop across tricky floating ledges, and jump over sharp spikes to reach the portal!
instructions: Press Left/Right Arrow keys or A/D to roll left or right. Use Spacebar, Up Arrow, or W to bounce upwards. Tap jump twice to double jump and clear massive gaps!

title: Plonky
description: A colorful high-speed platformer where you control Plonky, a cheerful character that can roll and jump. Find your way to the exits through various obstacles and solve tricky platforming puzzles!
instructions: Use WASD or Arrow Action keys to roll and guide. Press Spacebar, W, or Up Arrow to jump. Work your way through rolling gears, spike traps, and unlock final level exit gates!

title: Stickman Hook
description: A physics-based swinging game where you play as an agile stickman. Hook, swing, bounce off pads, and perform incredible acrobatics to reach the finish line!
instructions: Hold Left Mouse Click or Spacebar to attach your hook to a node and swing. Release to steer or let go and soar through the air. Bounce off trampoline pads to boost forwards!

title: Moto X3M 2
description: The thrilling sequel to the ultimate stunt bike racing game. Blast through challenging obstacle courses, perform extreme flips, and beat the clock in this dangerous winter wonderland!
instructions: Use W or Up Arrow to accelerate. Use S or Down Arrow to brake. Use A and D or Left and Right Arrows to tilt your bike left and right for flips!

title: Blacktop: Police Chase
description: An action-packed 3D driving game. Outrun the police, weave through traffic, collect cash to upgrade your vehicles, and escape the long arm of the law!
instructions: Use WASD or Arrow keys to steer, drift, and accelerate. Escape pursuing police cars, collect money on the road, and unlock epic getaway vehicles!
